The '''Multiple Missile Launch Turret''', or '''Trandoshan MMLT''' was a turret manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] that fired anti-personnel rockets. During the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]], [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]] used these weapons against [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] and [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. It shot small rockets at foes at a high velocity and with a delayed explosion. They were effective against [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]] and Wookiees. It was manned by one Trandoshan. It was armored with a blast shield in the front so the only way to infiltrate it was with detonators, anti-armor rounds, or [[LJ-50 concussion rifle/Legends|LJ-50 concussion rifle]] rounds.

==Behind the scenes==
It first appeared on the ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' website, where it was only described as a "Trandoshan MMLT", though the meaning of the acronym was not given. After the game's release in [[2005]], where it first appeared, [[Prima Games]] released the [[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide|official guide]], which described the weapon as well as giving it the name "Multiple Missile Launch Turret".
